message:
fix(fr-command): LPOP/RPOP count + LPOS MAXLEN error wording matches upstream

Two list-command error wording divergences from upstream Redis 7.2
t_list.c:

- LPOP/RPOP with non-numeric count argument now returns 'ERR
  value is out of range, must be positive' (consistent with the
  negative-count case) instead of the generic 'value is not an
  integer or out of range'. (br-frankenredis-lpopary)

- LPOS MAXLEN with non-numeric value now returns 'ERR MAXLEN can't
  be negative' (consistent with the negative-MAXLEN case) instead
  of the generic InvalidInteger error.
  (br-frankenredis-lposmaxlen)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
